creator: freebsdports@chillibear.com
text:
This patch is approved.



Although I noted that test application I ran threw:

    You don't have i18n installed in your application.
    Please add it to your Gemfile and run bundle install

However that is due to i18n not being a dependency when ActiveSupport is
installed and the string core extensions are required thus:

    require 'active_support'
    require 'active_support/core_ext/string'

Probably needs a slightly closer look at ActiveSupport to see if it should
be a dependency or a config option.  Either way installing
devel/rubygem-i18n fixes the exception and it's not directly related to
rubygem-mail as far as I can tell.

Regards

Eric
